metadata.source_title: Russian cyber threat also affects enterprising Netherlands

text: ABN AMRO Editorial. Since 2024, a new name has emerged in the cyber espionage landscape: Laundry Bear. The AIVD and MIVD discovered this Russian cyber actor. Laundry Bear collects sensitive information from European institutions and companies, including in the Netherlands. In the first known attack, employee business contact information was stolen.

metadata.source_title: Russian cyber threat also affects enterprising Netherlands

text: Since 2024, a new name has emerged in the cyber espionage landscape: Laundry Bear. The AIVD and MIVD discovered this Russian cyber actor. Laundry Bear collects sensitive information from European institutions and companies, including in the Netherlands. In the first known attack, employee business contact information was stolen. Since then, several organizations have been targeted by this sophisticated but subtle group.

text: Laundry Bear collects sensitive information from European institutions and companies, including in the Netherlands. In the first known attack, employee business contact information was stolen. Living off the Land Methods. They use techniques such as [phishing](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/wat-is-phishing.html), password spraying and so-called Living off the Land methods. They use techniques such as [phishing](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/wat-is-phishing.html), password spraying and so-called Living off the Land methods. text:
They use techniques such as [phishing](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/wat-is-phishing.html), password spraying and so-called Living off the Land methods. Existing software in an organization is abused without the immediate need for malicious software, which makes detection difficult. The group also uses stolen authentication tokens, such as cookies, obtained through criminal marketplaces. What can you do? To protect your organization you can, among other things:
Use multi-factor authentication (MFA).
